final:
module register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
